text:
A group of friends decides to kayak down a calm river early in the season. They paddle slowly, chatting about their plans for the weekend. Suddenly, a flock of flamingos jumps into the water nearby. They're very graceful, all lined up like that. One girl spots a really handsome flamingo nearby, and she can't take her eyes off it.

"Oh my gosh," she exclaims. "That one over there would go out of its mind for you!"

The girl blushes and giggles. "I wish!" She turns to her friends. "Do any of you want to go over there and get a photo?"

Everyone laughs. They each go over to their favorite flamingo, who's preening himself while chatting to a flock of other birds that are just as entranced by him.

After a while, one friend gets out a camera phone. "You're gorgeous," she says softly.
